object_a.label: curtain
object_a.long_form_open_description: White vertical vinyl blinds hanging on the left third of the image; they cover the sliding glass door and extend from ceiling to floor. Blinds show soft folds and are partially open toward the center, letting light through.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: directly left of the sliding/glass door; overlaying left side of the door frame

object_b.label: curtain
object_b.description: light-colored curtains or vertical blinds over sliding glass door
object_b.long_form_open_description: Sheer or light-colored curtains/vertical blinds covering a large sliding glass door at the rear of the room. They diffuse natural light entering the space and extend from near-ceiling to floor.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: located behind the living room seating, at the back wall of the room and centered in the scene
